name: gigafy_portal
title: Gigafy Management Portal
description: Read-only access to manage.gigafy.com.au via the Hotspot Login Services API. Sales orders, quotes, BOM lookups. Single shared service-account auth (transitional — Cameron's per-user OAuth + delegation will replace this).

credentials.label: Service account username
credentials.description: Username of the dedicated service account that AgentHQ uses to query the Portal.

credentials.label: Service account password
credentials.description: Encrypted at rest in the systemd-creds vault. Never visible to the LLM or to the agent user — only the trusted -mcp peer can decrypt it. Rotate via `sudo agenthq-cred set portal_api_pass`.

credentials.label: Reseller GUID
credentials.description: Gigafy's reseller GUID — used as a path segment in the Sales Orders search endpoint.

credentials.label: API URL
credentials.description: Defaults to https://au.api.hotspotlogin.services. Override only if you're pointing at a staging environment.

gigafy_portal_ping.description: Connectivity sanity check — mints a fresh access token and reports who we authenticated as

gigafy_portal_invoice_blank.description: Get an empty purchase-invoice template (the JSON shape the Portal expects when creating)

gigafy_portal_invoice_load.description: Load a purchase invoice by GUID — useful to verify a creation

gigafy_portal_create_purchase_invoice.description: Create (PUT) a purchase invoice in the Portal — pass the JSON payload

gigafy_portal_delete_purchase_invoice.description: Delete a purchase invoice by GUID — irreversible

gigafy_portal_supplier_lookup.description: Search suppliers by name fragment — call before create to avoid duplicates

gigafy_portal_supplier_blank.description: Get an empty supplier template (the JSON shape the Portal expects when creating)

gigafy_portal_create_supplier.description: Create (PUT) a supplier in the Portal — pass the JSON payload

gigafy_portal_inbox_list.description: List pending AP-invoice drafts in the Portal Inbox

gigafy_portal_inbox_load.description: Load an inbox draft by integer ID, plus reference data (suppliers, ledger accounts, tax groups, work orders, stock)

gigafy_portal_inbox_save.description: Create or update an AP-invoice draft in the Portal Inbox — flat shape, single line item

gigafy_portal_inbox_raise.description: Convert an inbox draft into a real Purchase Invoice — the actual create step

gigafy_portal_inbox_delete.description: Delete an inbox draft (reversible — you can re-create)
